texto: Exercise your creative muscles all the time, either through classes or through other artistic avenues like painting or dancing or even gardening, staying active and being creative so that when opportunities do come up, you are in a position to take advantage of them.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tom Irwin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Exercise your creative muscles all the time, either through classes or through other artistic ave…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, time, opportunities pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de opportunities.
